# Use Case Contribution

## Case Metadata

- Source URL:
- Author handle and profile URL:
- English title (10 words or fewer):
- Reader-action takeaway:
- Source-grounded notes:
- Type (`Demo`, `Tutorial`, `Evaluation`, `Integration`, `Benchmark`, or `Limit`):
- Date (`YYYY-MM-DD`):
- Category:
- Dedup key:
- Decision reason:
- Exact public prompt boundary, if any:

## Checklist

- [ ] The case is a real public workflow, tutorial, demo, integration, benchmark, or limitation.
- [ ] I did not invent prompts, workflow steps, results, prices, benchmark numbers, dates, or attribution.
- [ ] The source URL is not already present in the curated data or source index.
- [ ] `README.md`, curated JSON, Overview, Menu, anchors, and case numbering agree.
- [ ] All 10 localized README files contain real translated titles, takeaways, and notes.
- [ ] Source URL, author URL, type, date, model IDs, code, and environment variables match English in every language.
- [ ] Public media follows the R2 image/GIF/video policy and has an inventory and upload report.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/verify_repository.py` passes.
- [ ] The framework usecase verifier and public-surface link audit pass.
- [ ] Related Skill/API work remains in the separate `skill-release-agent` pipeline.
